title.en: Fast Is Not the Same as Good: Local Performance Optimum Is Not Equivalent to System-Wide Optimum
title.zh: 快不等于优：局部性能最优并不等价于系统整体最优

summary.en: A systematic analysis of in-container communication choices using OpenTelemetry Collector, configuration sidecars, and log agents, grounded in Amdahl's Law, Little's Law, tail latency, and cloud-native official practices.
summary.zh: 以 OpenTelemetry Collector、配置中心 Sidecar 和日志 Agent 为案例，结合 Amdahl 定律、Little 定律、尾延迟与云原生官方实践，分析容器内通信机制的系统化选型。

readingDirection.en: Read this when evaluating in-container process communication, sidecar data sharing, log collection, telemetry reporting, or shared-memory optimization.
readingDirection.zh: 适合在评估容器内进程通信、Sidecar 数据共享、日志采集、遥测上报或共享内存优化方案时阅读。
